title: hieracium verbascifolium subsp. mallophorum
intro: Hieracium verbascifolium subsp. mallophorum, also known as the common hawkweed, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Hieracium verbascifolium subsp. mallophorum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Hieracium verbascifolium subsp. mallophorum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various conditions, including digestive issues and fever.
